chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRAs 206, 205, 207, 208 & 209 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1680/2021 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on CMA No.1827/2017 4. For hearing of main case 05.11.2025 Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the questions raised in these reference applications have been decided against the department vide orders of this court dated 24.02.2021 passed in SCRA 91 of 2015 and 29.02.2024 passed in SCRA 47 of 2022. She states that the aforementioned orders are squarely binding on this court and in mutatis mutandis application thereof these reference applications may be dismissed in limine. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
